title: Associate Consultant (Medical Doctor)
description:
Set the standard for healthcare with the National University Health System, a world-class academic health system comprising the Alexandra Hospital, National University Hospital, Ng Teng Fong General Hospital, National University Polyclinics, National University Cancer Institute, Singapore, National University Heart Centre, Singapore, National University Centre for Oral Health, Singapore and Asia’s leading medical schools, the NUS Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine, the NUS Saw Swee Hock School of Public Health and the NUS Faculty of Dentistry, NUHS is perfectly placed to help you transform the patient experience and your career.

The Departments are seeking candidates who are highly motivated and willing to join us for a challenging and fulfilling appointment as Associate Consultants.

As an Associate Consultant, you will be required to carry out the duties as directed by the Chairman, Medical Board and Head of Department in accordance with the policies and guidelines set by the NUHS and the Ministry of Health (MOH).

  • Active in clinical practice;
  • Possess basic medical and postgraduate qualifications from the accredited medical universities or medical schools which are registrable with the Singapore Medical Council;
  • Must be successfully registered with the Singapore Medical Council and accredited by the Specialist Accreditation Board, Ministry of Health;
  • Able to work independently with demonstrated competence in managing patients in a multi-discipline environment; and
  • Confident, takes initiatives and a good team player

postedCompany.description:
The National University Health System (NUHS) plays a key, contributing role in Singapore’s healthcare. Our versatile and experienced team of healthcare professionals has only one aim - to help people get better, and live healthier and longer lives.

We do this by improving medical care, lowering disease recurrence, producing better healthcare professionals, and turning research findings into better medical treatments for diseases that affect Singaporeans. And the reason we’re able to do these things is because we have the best and most dedicated people. Come join us and help shape medicine for our future.
postedCompany.name: NATIONAL UNIVERSITY HEALTH SYSTEM PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
